title: AgentConfig
description: Per-project model selection for the TDD-workflow role agents (FEIP-7510). Each role carries a strongly-recommended model in its definition; the HIL overrides per project, asked at lakebase-create-project setup. Written to .lakebase/agent-config.json. The orchestrator resolves: override -> recommended -> inherit.

roles.description: Keyed by role name. Every role agent appears with its recommended model + optional HIL override.

recommended.description: The role's strongly-recommended model, mirrored from its definition's frontmatter (e.g. opus / sonnet / haiku / a full model id / inherit).

override.description: The HIL's per-project override. When absent, the orchestrator uses recommended.
